paraphrase_note: Conversational / verbose; closer to how a non-engineer might phrase the request.

message.content: Hey — I need you to ingest a contract for me. The contract id is `tafi_2025`. There's a PDF (Borrador de EF 2025 - Financiera Tafi - MICI.pdf) and a CSV (Cartera Total TAFI.csv) sitting at /mnt/session/uploads/input/tafi_2025/. Please follow your normal ingestion procedure, write the normalized outputs under /mnt/session/out/tafi_2025/, and respond with just the final envelope JSON. Thanks!
